name: Emberwood (Beta)
short_description: Embark on a thrilling journey through the mystical realm of Viridar. Play as the agile Sentinel or the mighty Dragon Knight, both equipped with their own unique skills and abilities. Gain allies and develop your combat prowess while traversing the war-torn path of the Warrior-King.
detailed_description: Embark on a thrilling journey through the mystical realm of Viridar. Play as the agile Sentinel or the mighty Dragon Knight, both equipped with their own unique skills and abilities. Discover awe-inspiring landscapes, while fighting against an array of monstrous foes and nefarious bandits. Gain allies and develop your combat skills while traversing the war-torn path of the warrior-king.
about_the_game: Embark on a thrilling journey through the mystical realm of Viridar. Play as the agile Sentinel or the mighty Dragon Knight, both equipped with their own unique skills and abilities. Discover awe-inspiring landscapes, while fighting against an array of monstrous foes and nefarious bandits. Gain allies and develop your combat skills while traversing the war-torn path of the warrior-king.
